landmines.name: ranking-ties-at-cutoff
landmines.kills: Ordering by play count alone leaves the 10th/11th boundary undefined when several tracks tie; the fixed tiebreak (title, then track_id) makes the top-10 unique.

landmines.name: return-title-not-id
landmines.kills: Returning only track_id, or forgetting the artist join, produces an unreadable shelf; a human-readable track title and artist name are required.
